contract.title: API Consumer Satisfaction (NPS) survey-measurement contract
contract.description: A purpose-built, air-gapped local usage fixture seeded with an api_request_logs table + collected survey responses (DummyJSON is never used or modified). Agents render the documented contract as a measurement plan; ground truth is the canonical plan executed against the seeded fixture.

survey_questions.text: On a scale of 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend this API to a colleague?
What is the biggest pain point you experience with this API?
What feature or improvement would most impact your work?
Any other feedback about your experience?
